ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the city is located (e.g., US, GB) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "keyword_repetitions" INTEGER /* Number of keyword repetitions indicating interest */,
  "real_coverage_per_million" REAL /* Real coverage metric per million inhabitants */,
  "relative_interest" REAL /* Relative interest score for the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city data */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword or phrase representing interest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword's relevance */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the keyword */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the keyword */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the keyword data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_keywords" (
  "city_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city-keyword association */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city from the cities table */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword from the keywords table */,
  "repetition_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the keyword is repeated for the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city-keyword association */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the repetition count data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_keywords_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city from the cities table */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic related to the interest score */,
  "interest_score" REAL /* Interest score for the topic in the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the interest score */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interest score data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the interest score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interests_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city from the cities table */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group classification (e.g., 0-18, 19-35) */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population belonging to this age group */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender classification */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity classification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* HTTP request method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city from the cities table */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average income) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_metrics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city related to the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text of the resolution provided */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
